global_production_variables.directorial_treatment: Cinematic lighting, clear coverage, natural performances.

Character_Officer_1.description: Middle-aged man, early 40s, solid medium build, clean-shaven or light stubble, square face, brown eyes, short neat brown hair; 1840s municipal officer dress—dark wool frock coat, waistcoat, white shirt, dark trousers.
Character_Officer_1.visual_lock: Same square-faced middle-aged officer with short neat brown hair and solid build; dark wool frock coat and waistcoat. Face distinct from Narrator's hollow pale look and from the other two officers' hair and features.

Character_Officer_2.description: Adult man, late 30s, stocky build, broader shoulders, rounder face, darker brown eyes, short black hair, clean-shaven; matching 1840s dark municipal officer coat, waistcoat, white shirt, dark trousers.
Character_Officer_2.visual_lock: Same stocky build, rounder face, short black hair; identical dark officer coat style as the other officers but face and hair clearly different from Officer 1 (brown hair, square face) and Officer 3.

Character_Officer_3.description: Older adult man, late 40s to early 50s, lean tall build, long narrow face, gray-streaked sandy hair, light eyes, thin mustache; 1840s dark municipal officer coat, waistcoat, white shirt, dark trousers.
Character_Officer_3.visual_lock: Same lean tall frame, long narrow face, gray-streaked sandy hair and thin mustache; dark officer coat consistent with the trio but features distinct from Officer 1 and Officer 2.

Character_OldMan.description: Elderly man, thin frail build, deeply lined pale face, sparse white or silver hair, one distinctive pale blue eye that catches light (the other may be dulled or ordinary); 1840s domestic elder.
Character_OldMan.visual_lock: Same frail elderly face, sparse white hair, and signature pale blue eye glint in every appearance. Never confusable with the younger pale Narrator—older, softer jaw, white hair, single vivid pale blue eye as the fixed identifying trait.
